name: tailwind-shadcn-standard
description: RMP's Tailwind v4 + shadcn + design-token styling standard, made to travel with the tooling instead of being re-authored in each repo's CLAUDE.md / app_spec.txt. A SessionStart hook injects a short pointer when it detects the stack (and stays silent otherwise); an on-demand skill holds the full guide; a non-blocking PreToolUse hook warns on banned styling patterns at write time.
